composite_description: Sharp drawdown in bear market -- near-term noisy, 60d edge solid. Size smaller. All three assets confirm the drawdown.
brief:
**SIGNAL & EXPECTATION**

Composite reads BUY on BEAR x DEEP—sharp five-day drawdown (-14.7% to -23.4% across BTC, ETH, SOL) at extreme z-scores (-2.80 to -3.02) within established bear market. Framework validates all three assets confirm the move. Backtest on 84 prior BEAR-phase deep-drawdown days shows the 7d/14d/30d forward returns are noisy (+0.5%, -1.1%, -0.5% medians respectively), with meaningful edge only extending to 60d (+5.0%). Near-term unpredictability is structural to bear-market recoveries.

**SUPPORTING CONTEXT**

Funding rates negative (shorts paying -6.8% annualized) suggest some liquidation relief; Fear & Greed at 8 indicates capitulation sentiment. Bitcoin dominance stable at 56.3% with total market cap at $2.25T. The signal's honest read: do not expect directional confidence through end of week. Position sizing should reflect 60d horizon as the reliable inflection point, not intraweek noise.

outliers.name: NEAR Protocol
outliers.catalyst_summary: No identifiable fundamental catalyst detected for NEAR's +13.3% outperformance.
outliers.source_hint: Significant divergence from peer basket warrants monitoring for delayed news or derivatives positioning flows.
